rules.rule: Component C# logic must be placed in a ComponentBase class; .razor files must contain markup and minimal binding expressions only.
Component base class names must use the Base suffix (e.g., StudentComponentBase).
Each component must govern exactly one UI concern; split components with multiple concerns.
Component base classes must call only UI broker or service interfaces; direct broker access is forbidden.
Pages must be organized under a Pages/ folder; reusable components must be organized under a Components/ folder.
Components must not contain inline styles; all styling must be in external CSS or CSS isolation files.
Components must not contain hard-coded string literals; extract to constants or resource files.
